items.title_en: E.l.f. Beauty to walk back some tariff price increases amid high gas prices and consumer 'suffering'
items.title_zh: E.l.f.在高油价和消费者“痛苦”的情况下，美丽将取消部分关税价格上涨
items.desc_en: E.l.f. Beauty raised prices by $1 last August to offset the impact of tariffs. It's now planning to walk back some of that back amid a consumer pullback.
items.desc_zh: E.l.f. Beauty去年8月将价格提高了1美元，以抵消关税的影响。现在，该公司正计划在消费者减少的情况下收回部分资金。

items.title_en: Harvard faculty vote to limit A grades for undergraduates - The Washington Post
items.title_zh: 哈佛大学教师投票限制本科生 A 级成绩 - 《华盛顿邮报》
items.desc_en: Harvard faculty vote to limit A grades for undergraduates  The Washington PostHarvard faculty votes to make it more difficult for undergrads to earn A’s  Boston HeraldHarvard faculty vote to cap numbe
items.desc_zh: 哈佛教职人员投票限制本科生 A 成绩《华盛顿邮报》哈佛大学教职人员投票决定让本科生更难获得 A 波士顿先驱报哈佛教职人员投票限制了学生获得 A 的人数

items.title_en: Intuit plans to cut workforce by about 17% as tax software maker reckons with slowing growth
items.title_zh: 由于税务软件制造商考虑到增长放缓，Intuit 计划裁员约 17%
items.desc_en: Intuit's stock has been hammered this year as investors worry that generative artificial intelligence models could threaten software companies.
items.desc_zh: 由于投资者担心生成式人工智能模型可能威胁到软件公司，Intuit 的股价今年受到重创。

items.title_en: US charges Cuba's Raúl Castro with murder over 1996 downing of two planes
items.title_zh: 美国指控古巴劳尔·卡斯特罗谋杀 1996 年击落两架飞机
items.desc_en: Castro and five others are charged with conspiracy to kill US nationals, murder, and destruction of aircraft
items.desc_zh: 卡斯特罗和其他五人被指控密谋杀害美国公民、谋杀和毁坏飞机

items.title_en: Austrian ex-intelligence officer found guilty of Russia spying charges
items.title_zh: 奥地利前情报官员被判犯有俄罗斯间谍罪
items.desc_en: The spy scandal has revived fears that Austria remains a hotbed of Russian espionage activity.
items.desc_zh: 间谍丑闻再次引发人们对奥地利仍然是俄罗斯间谍活动温床的担忧。

items.title_en: Bezos defends billionaires, hypes AI, talks taxes and praises Trump in major CNBC interview
items.title_zh: 贝索斯在 CNBC 大型采访中为亿万富翁辩护、大肆宣传人工智能、谈论税收并赞扬特朗普
items.desc_en: Jeff Bezos rejected accusations that Amazon's decision to release a documentary on first lady Melania Trump was an effort to curry favor with the president.
items.desc_zh: 杰夫·贝佐斯否认了有关亚马逊决定发布第一夫人梅拉尼娅·特朗普的纪录片是为了讨好总统的指控。

items.title_en: DOJ charges ex-prosecutor with stealing Trump documents case report prepared by Jack Smith
items.title_zh: 司法部指控前检察官窃取特朗普文件由杰克·史密斯准备的案件报告
items.desc_en: Carmen Mercedes Lineberger allegedy emailed herself a copy of Volume II of special counsel Jack Smith's report on Trump's criminal case.
items.desc_zh: 据称，卡门·梅塞德斯·莱恩伯格（Carmen Mercedes Lineberger）通过电子邮件给自己发送了特别检察官杰克·史密斯（Jack Smith）关于特朗普刑事案件的报告第二卷的副本。

items.title_en: OpenAI takes the lead in AI IPO horse race: 'Getting to public markets first is very important'
items.title_zh: OpenAI在AI IPO赛马中领先：“首先进入公开市场非常重要”
items.desc_en: It comes after reports that the AI giant and ChatGPT owner is set to file confidentially for an IPO as soon as this week.
items.desc_zh: 此前有报道称，这家人工智能巨头和 ChatGPT 所有者最快将于本周秘密申请 IPO。

items.title_en: Ram unveils lineup of Hemi V-8 engine-powered 'muscle trucks' despite high gas prices
items.title_zh: 尽管汽油价格高昂，Ram 仍推出了 Hemi V-8 发动机驱动的“肌肉卡车”系列
items.desc_en: Stellantis plans to launch a new lineup of what it's calling "muscle trucks" for its Ram brand despite elevated U.S. gas prices due to the war in Iran.
items.desc_zh: 尽管伊朗战争导致美国汽油价格上涨，Stellantis 仍计划为其 Ram 品牌推出一系列所谓的“肌肉卡车”。

items.title_en: Mamdani fires back at Bezos over Queens teacher tax remark
items.title_zh: 马姆达尼就皇后区教师的税务言论回击贝索斯
items.desc_en: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos called for eliminating federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners as Mamdani pushes a luxury second-home tax in New York City.
items.desc_zh: 随着马姆达尼在纽约市推行豪华第二居所税，亚马逊创始人杰夫·贝索斯呼吁取消对收入最低的一半人征收的联邦所得税。

items.title_en: UAE says new pipeline that will bypass Strait of Hormuz is nearly 50% complete
items.title_zh: 阿联酋表示，绕过霍尔木兹海峡的新管道已完成近 50%
items.desc_en: The UAE has redirected some oil exports through an existing pipeline to Fujairah, which has a maximum capacity of 1.8 million barrels per day.
items.desc_zh: 阿联酋已通过现有管道将部分石油出口转向富查伊拉，该管道的最大产能为每天 180 万桶。

items.title_en: Why some investors are turning to high-yield bonds amid the volatility. Where to find opportunity
items.title_zh: 为什么一些投资者在波动中转向高收益债券。哪里可以找到机会
items.desc_en: Rates recently took a leg higher across the fixed income market, but some investors see opportunity in high-yield bonds.
items.desc_zh: 固定收益市场的利率最近有所走高，但一些投资者看到了高收益债券的机会。

items.title_en: Fed officials see rate hike ahead if inflation stays elevated, minutes show
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，美联储官员预计，如果通胀保持在高位，美联储将加息

items.desc_zh: 大多数官员预计，如果伊朗战争继续加剧通胀，则有必要加息。

items.title_en: U.S. crude oil falls below $100 per barrel after Trump says Iran talks in final stages
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示伊朗谈判已进入最后阶段，美国原油跌破每桶100美元
items.desc_en: Trump told reporters that the administration was in the "final stages" of negotiations with Iran, according to a pool report.
items.desc_zh: 据一份联合报告称，特朗普告诉记者，政府正处于与伊朗谈判的“最后阶段”。

items.title_en: Tesla Cybertruck driver arrested after driving into lake to use 'wade mode', police say
items.title_zh: 警方称，特斯拉赛博卡车司机因使用“涉水模式”驶入湖中而被捕
items.desc_en: Police said the vehicle was abandoned by the driver after it took on water near the shoreline of Grapevine Lake in north Texas.
items.desc_zh: 警方表示，这辆车在德克萨斯州北部格雷普韦恩湖海岸线附近进水后被司机遗弃。

items.title_en: Rosenberg: Putin enjoys Xi's Chinese welcome but heads home without pipeline deal
items.title_zh: 罗森伯格：普京受到习近平的中国欢迎，但未达成管道协议就回国
items.desc_en: Russia and China showed they were shoulder-to-shoulder on the world stage, but it became clear there are limits, says the BBC's Russia Editor.
items.desc_zh: 英国广播公司俄罗斯编辑表示，俄罗斯和中国在世界舞台上表现出并肩作战，但很明显存在局限性。

items.title_en: Final two bodies of missing Italians recovered from inside Maldives cave
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫洞穴内发现最后两具失踪意大利人尸体
items.desc_en: The two were among five Italian nationals who drowned in last week's scuba diving accident in the Maldives.
items.desc_zh: 两人是上周在马尔代夫发生的水肺潜水事故中溺水身亡的五名意大利公民之一。

items.title_en: Whale to be removed from Danish island after failed German rescue
items.title_zh: 德国救援失败后，鲸鱼将被从丹麦岛上移走
items.desc_en: Danish officials will conduct a post mortem examination on the whale, which was released into the sea from a barge more than two weeks ago.
items.desc_zh: 丹麦官员将对这头鲸鱼进行尸检，这头鲸鱼是两周前从驳船上被释放到海里的。

items.title_en: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
items.title_zh: 以色列极右翼部长因嘲笑戴手铐的加沙船队活动人士而受到谴责
items.desc_en: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.

items.title_en: Jeff Bezos says there is ‘no truth’ to the ‘buy borrow die’ tax strategy
items.title_zh: 杰夫·贝佐斯表示“买借模具”税收策略“没有事实依据”

items.desc_zh: 在白俄罗斯边境附近发现疑似无人机后，航班暂停，并敦促人们避难。

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.title_en: Russia and China scold the United States over 'Golden Dome' plans - Reuters
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯和中国就“金顶”计划斥责美国 - 路透中文网
items.desc_en: Russia and China scold the United States over 'Golden Dome' plans  ReutersChina’s Xi gives Putin a red-carpet welcome – and makes a veiled jab at the US  CNNXi basks in spotlight as he hosts Putin day
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯和中国就“金顶”计划斥责美国 路透中国习近平走红地毯欢迎普京，并含蓄地攻击美国 CNN 习近平在主持普京日时成为众人瞩目的焦点

items.title_en: Nigeria arrests former minister in hiding after corruption conviction
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚逮捕腐败定罪后躲藏的前部长
items.desc_en: The former power minister was sentenced to 75 years in jail in absentia earlier this month.
items.desc_zh: 这位前电力部长本月早些时候被缺席判处 75 年监禁。

items.title_en: Trump's Greenland envoy faces uphill battle on mission to make 'friends'
items.title_zh: 特朗普的格陵兰特使面临交“朋友”使命的艰苦战斗
items.desc_en: Jeff Landry's visit to the territory, a semi-autonomous part of Denmark, has touched a nerve among some Greenlanders.
items.desc_zh: 杰夫·兰德里对这片丹麦半自治地区的访问触动了一些格陵兰人的神经。

items.title_en: Man who murdered teen TikTok star in Pakistan gets death sentence
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦谋杀青少年 TikTok 明星的男子被判处死刑
items.desc_en: Sana Yousaf's murder highlights a pattern of violence against women in Pakistan, activists say.
items.desc_zh: 活动人士称，萨娜·优素福的谋杀凸显了巴基斯坦针对妇女的暴力行为。

items.title_zh: 谷歌将推出自谷歌眼镜失败以来首款智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.
items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。

items.title_zh: Zoe Kleinman：为什么人工智能行业是马斯克-奥特曼试验的真正赢家
items.desc_en: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。

items.title_en: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
items.title_zh: Robo-top：可以为你制作下一件 T 恤的机器
items.desc_en: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.
items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
items.title_zh: 卫星和人工智能用于追踪英国刺猬以减缓其数量下降
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望该项目还能帮助找出刺猬在野外寻找食物和交配的障碍。

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。

items.title_en: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 陪审团驳回埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 及其老板萨姆·奥尔特曼的诉讼
items.desc_en: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".
items.desc_zh: 陪审员们花了近一个月的时间在这场备受瞩目的审判中听取和查看证据，马斯克在审判中指控奥特曼“窃取慈善机构”。

items.title_en: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
items.title_zh: 皇家天文台警告说，即时人工智能答案可能会削弱人类智能
items.desc_en: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。

items.title_en: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。

items.title_en: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi 老板警告说，人工智能可能会让人们失业并损害经济
items.desc_en: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.
items.desc_zh: 埃本·厄普顿 (Eben Upton) 对人工智能将在未来几年摧毁大量计算角色的说法提出警告。

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。
